subject: Re: Trouble
body:
it doesn't sound good   be careful


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 26, 2007 4:25:46 PM
Subject: Trouble


Jeffrey, 
I'm in a bad situation. I didn't do my due diligence on Arabs. After 2 weeks on the job, my employer decided to cut my salary by 1/3.
 
I just signed a contract for an apt. Only month to month, but I will have to find a new place within the month. 
 
My best strategy is to stall the signing of the contract b/c once the contract is signed the visa process will start and then I'm locked in due to 6 month employee ban - I can't work for another co for six months. 
 
While stalling, I will look for a new job. 

Always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
